justification: The diff correctly updates Java version to 21, migrates javax.* to jakarta.* namespaces, upgrades Spring to 6.x and Hibernate to 6.x, and uses @PostMapping instead of @RequestMapping with RequestMethod. However, it doesn't leverage any Java 21-specific idioms (records, pattern matching, virtual threads, etc.), and the compiler plugin uses <release> instead of <source>/<target> which is good but not Java 21-specific. The migration is coherent and removes deprecated patterns, but lacks Java 21 features.
